messages.content: Output only space-separated integers, nothing else.

You are a time-series forecaster. Below is a univariate sequence of 4 integers in [0, 99]. Continue the sequence with exactly 4 more integers, separated by single spaces, no other text.

Sequence: 99 66 0 0
